[Gulf of Finland] ESTONIAN NAV WARN 072/26
240501 UTC MAY
ESTONIAN NAV WARN 072/26
GULF OF FINLAND
270700-271300 UTC MAY
280800-281400 UTC MAY
W OF NAISSAAR ISLAND
FIRING PRACTICE AREA 2A
CENTRED 59-35N 024-19E
FIRING EXERCISES IN PROGRESS
OTHER VESSELS MUST AVOID
ENTRY INTO THE AREA
STANDING BY VHF CH 13 AND 61
CANCEL 281400 UTC MAY
